title: psyb0t/aigate
summary: Self-hosted AI gateway. 81 models across 12 providers, free-tier-first routing with automatic fallback. Local CPU inference and transcription with no rate limits. Any model can autonomously browse the web (stealth, passes Cloudflare), run agentic Claude Code, and manage object storage — all via MCP. Expose publicly through Cloudflare Tunnel.

title: astrutt/AutomataArena
summary: An autonomous, LLM-driven IRC combat arena where AI agents fight, level up, and dynamically generate lore.

title: milothoelen/AI-ChatBot
summary: 🤖 Build personalized chatbots in just 5 cells using Colab and Groq, making AI visually appealing and user-friendly.

title: JLABUAN/open-agent-sdk-rust
summary: 🤖 Build AI agents in Rust on your hardware for fast, private, and controlled solutions like copy editing, code reviewing, and market analysis.

title: mahdidjemaci/production-rag
summary: 🔍 Enhance retrieval accuracy with a production-ready RAG system that integrates semantic and lexical search for optimal results.

title: Horlicks-p/mp-ukagaka
summary: Create your own ukagakas and display one of them on your wordpress blog. You can get more information about ukagaka at [Wikipedia](http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ukagaka).

title: Arezkiiiii/mini_llm
summary: 🚀 Build and understand a Large Language Model from scratch using PyTorch through hands-on notebooks focused on core Transformer concepts.

title: MooNyeu/granitepi-4-nano
summary: 🔒 Run a large language model locally on your Raspberry Pi 5 with IBM Granite 4.0 for private, cloud-free AI inference.

title: OvidijusParsiunas/deep-chat
summary: Fully customizable AI chatbot component for your website

title: hydrahive/hydrahive
summary: Self-hosted AI Agent Platform — One brain. Many heads. Infinite reach.

title: ronniwheellike973/Mini-Agent
summary: 🧠 Build intelligent agents with Mini Agent, a streamlined demo project leveraging MiniMax M2 for advanced reasoning and robust contextual management.

title: MichaelLod/byoky
summary: Open-source AI wallet — your keys never leave your device. 15 providers, 2 lines to integrate, cross-provider translation. Browser extension + iOS + Android.

title: DryadeAI/Dryade
summary: Self-hosted AI orchestration platform. Connect any LLM, orchestrate agents, build workflows — all on your infrastructure.

title: arpan10000/simple-rag-pipeline-demo
summary: 🌌 Build a simple RAG pipeline to generate AI-driven answers using Chroma DB for storage and Grok LLM for context-aware response generation.

title: Almaskhan123/WeKnora
summary: 🔗 Connect and enhance your communication with WeKnora, a powerful platform for seamless integration and interaction in WeChat services.

title: konjoai/squish
summary: 🤖🗜️⚡️ Compress local LLMs once, run them forever at sub-second load times. OpenAI + Ollama drop-in for Apple Silicon — statistically identical accuracy, 54× faster cold starts.

title: Pawansingh3889/OpsMind
summary: On-prem AI query tool for manufacturing. NL-to-SQL in 5 seconds. LangGraph agent, pgvector + ChromaDB RAG, Gemma 3 12B via Ollama. 19 tables, read-only.

title: langchain4j/langchain4j
summary: LangChain4j is an open-source Java library that simplifies the integration of LLMs into Java applications through a unified API, providing access to popular LLMs and vector databases. It makes implementing RAG, tool calling (including support for MCP), and agents easy. LangChain4j integrates seamlessly with various enterprise Java frameworks.

title: DearVa/Everywhere
summary: Context-aware AI assistant for your desktop. Ready to respond intelligently, seamlessly integrating multiple LLMs and MCP tools.
